statement: Winter networks have higher connectivity than summer
key_unexpected_finding: Right-skewed degree distribution — median = 5 both seasons; extreme hubs drive mean difference

statement: Hub regions shift geographically between seasons
key_unexpected_finding: Southern Ocean dominates both seasons; tropical monsoon hub dominance not observed; NH storm tracks activate in DJF

statement: Long-distance links more abundant in winter
key_unexpected_finding: Long-range advantage concentrated in 2,500–5,000 km range; DJF percolation morphology gradual vs JJA abrupt
